figures.caption: Figure 2: Patient count per specialty. Specific documents, off distribution, were written for four use cases. A subset of the dataset is temporarily embargoed to enable future evaluations under controlled conditions, thereby limiting the risk of large language model contamination through prior exposure to the data. In total, we release 4,254 patients (6,185 documents) and keep 755 patients (1,209 documents) under embargo for future release.
Figure 1: High-level structure of the dataset (JSON format)
Figure 4: Document and word count by document type. The number of documents to write for a patient was imposed by the initial scenario. Word count is computed by the library edsnlp (v0.20).
